faculty.name: Dr. Monochura Saha
research_interests: My research focuses on developing smart
biodegradable organic devices that can detect diseases such as cancer and diabetes at very early stages while offering safer
drug-free therapeutic options. By integrating chemistry and biology at the device level
I aim to sense biomolecules within the microenvironment and reprogram them to restore healthy functions. To achieve this
my work involves the synthesis of organic and nanomaterials
validation through in vitro cell culture
and subsequent testing in preclinical animal models. The ultimate goal is to deliver affordable
eco-friendly solutions for diagnostics and therapies that reduce mortality
